channel.title: SpotPulse Trending
channel.description: Live web pulse — India & Global intelligence dashboard.

item.title: US, Iran Wrangle Over Terms as Trump Rejects Peace Proposal
item.description: The US and Iran remain far apart on a framework to end their war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, as President Donald Trump rejected the Islamic Republic’s response to his proposed peace plan, but stopped short of declaring a resumption of fighting. Mica Soellner of Bloomberg Government has more. (Source: Bloomberg)

item.title: War breaking news. Iran rejects US plan: 'Excessive demands'. Trump: 'Unacceptable' - Il Sole 24 ORE
item.description: War breaking news. Iran rejects US plan: 'Excessive demands'. Trump: 'Unacceptable' Il Sole 24 ORE

item.title: Bank of America Tightened Block Trade Rules After Esprit Deal
item.description: Bank of America Corp. adopted new block‑trade guidelines months after a deal now at the center of a criminal trial involving a well-known hedge fund, a Hong Kong court heard Monday.

item.title: Bengal News: UPI Trail Cracks Suvendu Adhikari Aide Murder Case | Killers Tracked Across States - DNA India
item.description: Bengal News: UPI Trail Cracks Suvendu Adhikari Aide Murder Case | Killers Tracked Across States DNA India

item.title: Rupee crashes 82 paise to close at all-time low of 95.31 against U.S. dollar
item.description: A strengthening U.S. dollar and steep FPI outflows further pressured the local unit, according to forex traders

item.title: Asian shares mixed, oil jumps 4% after Donald Trump rejects Iran's response to ceasefire proposal
item.description: Oil prices surge as U.S. President Donald Trump declines Iran’s response to the U.S. proposal to ceasefire as “TOTALLY UNACCEPTABLE!”

item.title: JSW Energy Q4 Results: Cons profit rises 38% YoY to Rs 574 crore; revenue jumps 41%
item.description: JSW Energy announced a significant 38% year-on-year increase in its consolidated net profit for the March-ended quarter, reaching Rs 574 crore. This strong performance was driven by a substantial 41% jump in revenue, which climbed to Rs 4,499 crore in Q4FY26 compared to the previous year's corresponding period.

item.title: Govt Considering Fuel Price Hike Amid US-Iran Deadlock As Companies Face Massive Losses: Report
item.description: Discussions are reportedly underway between the finance and petroleum ministries and oil marketing companies over a possible fuel price hike amid the US-Iran deadlock.

item.title: Greatest setback for workers' rights since Independence: Congress on new labour codes
item.description: Congress president Mallikarjun Kharge said the Modi government waited for the Assembly elections to conclude before notifying the four "anti-worker" labour codes

item.title: Russia and Ukraine trade blame for continued fighting as US-brokered ceasefire nears its end - ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos
item.description: Russia and Ukraine trade blame for continued fighting as US-brokered ceasefire nears its end ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos

item.title: Brent oil tops $103 after Trump dismisses Iran’s peace proposal response
item.description: Oil prices jumped on Monday after Israel warned that the conflict with Iran was still ongoing.

item.title: Rupee drops most in a month to record closing as oil runs hot over US-Iran stalemate
item.description: The Indian rupee experienced its sharpest fall in over a month, reaching a record low against the dollar. Rising crude oil prices, driven by tensions in the Strait of Hormuz, significantly impacted the currency. India's equity markets and government bonds also saw declines.

item.title: Bangladesh's Big Remark on India-China Ties: Won't be a ‘Football’ Between Two Countries - The Sunday Guardian
item.description: Bangladesh's Big Remark on India-China Ties: Won't be a ‘Football’ Between Two Countries The Sunday Guardian

item.title: SIR deletions more than win margin: SC's '2%, 15%' comment at core of plea by Mamata Banerjee's TMC on Bengal polls
item.description: Judge had posed said in April: “Suppose margin is 2%, and 15% of electorate who are mapped could not vote, then… we would definitely have to apply our minds.”

item.title: Former Qatar PM: Netanyahu using Iran war to reshape Middle East
item.description: Sheikh Hamad bin Jassim warns Strait of Hormuz crisis is most dangerous fallout of war on Iran, calls for 'Gulf NATO'.

item.title: Taiwan civilians sharpen self-defence skills ahead of Trump-Xi summit
item.description: Taiwanese civilians are flocking to self‑defence courses, amid fears China could one day use force to seize the island.

item.title: Iltija Mufti’s X account blocked
item.description: It comes days after the J&K lodged a FIR against unidentified individuals “promoting separatist ideology and propagating false information, with an intent to incite unlawful activities prejudicial to the peace, sovereignty and integrity of India”

item.title: Ink Finance Treasury on Polygon Drained in $140K Exploit, Blockaid Reports - Cryptonews.net
item.description: Ink Finance Treasury on Polygon Drained in $140K Exploit, Blockaid Reports Cryptonews.net

item.title: NEET-UG 2026: NTA says committed to fair, credible exams amid Rajasthan SOG probe
item.description: Seeking to reassure students and parents, the NTA said the efforts and integrity of the "very large majority of bona-fide aspirants" would not be devalued

item.title: Hormuz, hydrocarbons, and India: What the current Middle East conflict means for Indian oil and gas markets - ET EnergyWorld
item.description: Hormuz, hydrocarbons, and India: What the current Middle East conflict means for Indian oil and gas markets ET EnergyWorld

item.title: Discounts on Russian Oil Widened for First Time Since Iran War
item.description: Discounts on Russia’s flagship crude widened for the first time since the start of the Iran war, as shifting expectations over a possible end to the Middle East conflict rattled oil markets.

item.title: Why PM Asked Households To Cut Use Of Cooking Oil And What's The Alternative
item.description: In many speeches and even during Mann Ki Baat, PM Modi has urged people to use less oil.

item.title: West Bengal Secretariat moving back to Writers’ Buildings; small traders hope for revival of businesses
item.description: Owners of tea stalls and small eateries, fruit vendors and traders in the surroundings of the nearly 250-year-old Writers’ Buildings said the return of government employees and visitors is expected to boost their businesses

item.title: Investors Cheer as Alphabet Goes From AI Zero to Hero
item.description: The Google parent is challenging Nvidia for the title of world’s largest company.

item.title: India, Iran To Hold Talks On Strait Of Hormuz Safe Passage Amid BRICS Meet In Delhi: Report - NDTV Profit
item.description: India, Iran To Hold Talks On Strait Of Hormuz Safe Passage Amid BRICS Meet In Delhi: Report NDTV Profit

item.title: Manipur Naga bodies seek PM’s ‘personal’ intervention against armed Kuki groups aiding external aggression
item.description: The civil society groups said that the use of drones, rocket launchers, and other military-grade weapons, along with reports that armed cadres crossed the India-Myanmar border, pointed to a well-coordinated foreign-backed assault

item.title: Maldives repays second $50 million Indian treasury bill: Muizzu
item.description: The Maldives has made a significant payment to India, settling a USD 50 million treasury bill. This move aims to reduce the nation's external debt. India had previously provided financial support through treasury bills subscribed by the State Bank of India. President Muizzu stated that his administration has cleared this debt, preventing a larger financial burden.

item.title: India faces risk of weaker monsoon, raising inflation and growth concerns - CNA
item.description: India faces risk of weaker monsoon, raising inflation and growth concerns CNA

item.title: Hackers Abuse Google Ads and Claude.ai Shared Chats to Distribute macOS Malware - gHacks
item.description: Hackers Abuse Google Ads and Claude.ai Shared Chats to Distribute macOS Malware gHacks

item.title: Sell Any Rally in Luxury Stocks as Growth Slows, Berenberg Says
item.description: Investors should sell any rally in luxury stocks as the sector grapples with entrenched growth challenges, according to Berenberg analysts.

item.title: Fertilisers stock comfortable to meet requirement of Kharif sowing season: Govt
item.description: India's fertilizer supply for the upcoming Kharif season is secure. The Centre confirmed comfortable stock levels, exceeding usual requirements. Maximum retail prices for major fertilizers remain stable. Domestic production and imports have bolstered availability. The government has secured significant quantities of NPK complexes, DAP, triple super phosphate, and ammonium sulfate.

item.title: Centre allows big funds to bid for BOT highway projects
item.description: India's Ministry of Road Transport and Highways is opening build-operate-transfer road projects to large institutional investors. This policy shift aims to boost private participation in highway development. Previously, these funds were mostly limited to toll-operate-transfer projects. The government has eased eligibility rules to attract more investment.

item.title: Iran says US making ‘unreasonable’ demands in negotiations to end war
item.description: Foreign ministry spokesman Esmaeil Baghaei says Iran's proposal to end the conflict, unblock Hormuz Strait is generous.

item.title: Saylor Says Strategy Will Buy 10 to 20 Bitcoin for Every One It Sells - unchainedcrypto.com
item.description: Saylor Says Strategy Will Buy 10 to 20 Bitcoin for Every One It Sells unchainedcrypto.com

item.title: Hackers Can Exploit Windows CreateFileW API to Lock Thousands of SMB Files - cyberpress.org
item.description: Hackers Can Exploit Windows CreateFileW API to Lock Thousands of SMB Files cyberpress.org

item.title: Nitin Gadkari inaugurates barrier less Mundka-Bakkarwala toll plaza on Urban Extension Road-II
item.description: NHAI is planning to roll out more Multi-Lane Free Flow tolling at national highway fee plazas covering 17 fee plazas across nine states; all aimed to go live by September 2026

item.title: AI-enabled oversight layer for continuous electoral roll monitoring
item.description: SIR 2.0 exposed structural weaknesses in electoral roll revision processes; an AI-enabled oversight layer integrated with ECINet could continuously monitor electoral operations, detect anomalies and discriminatory patterns in real time, and strengthen transparency, neutrality, and accountability

item.title: Number of shareholders of Share India Securities Ltd Rights 2023-17.03.23 For Shares – BSE:SHARE_RE - TradingView
item.description: Number of shareholders of Share India Securities Ltd Rights 2023-17.03.23 For Shares – BSE:SHARE_RE TradingView

item.title: India State Refiners Eye Modest Fuel Price Hike as Losses Mount
item.description: Indian state refiners are expecting a modest increase in retail fuel prices within days, as the government seeks to balance the impact of the ten-week war in the Persian Gulf and the needs of consumers.

item.title: Global oil reserves depleting at alarming rate due to Hormuz Crisis; Many countries might run out of energy, - India.Com
item.description: Global oil reserves depleting at alarming rate due to Hormuz Crisis; Many countries might run out of energy, India.Com
